# Group Fit — LLM Full Context

Last updated: 2026-01-18
Canonical site: https://groupfitapp.com/

## One-sentence summary
Group Fit is a Canadian platform that lets customers book verified trainers, instructors, and coaches for in-person sessions at the customer’s chosen address, either solo or with their own private group.

## What Group Fit is
- A marketplace for in-person fitness coaching in Canada.
- Customers choose the location (home, condo gym, park, facility) and book a session at that address.
- Customers can book for themselves or create a private group with friends/family and split the cost.
- Group Fit offers a variety of training specializations (fitness, sports, martial arts, and other disciplines), depending on trainer availability in the selected location/time.

## What Group Fit is not
- Not a public “drop-in” group class platform (no public open classes listed on the website).
- Not a service where customers must travel to a gym location (the model is trainer-to-customer).
- Not a direct “matching” concierge (users search availability and book through the platform).

## Core customer flow
1. Choose activity/specialization.
2. Enter the address where the session will take place.
3. Select date/time and view trainer availability for that location.
4. Book in the app for a 1-hour session.
5. Optionally invite friends/family to form a private group and split the cost.

## Core trainer flow
- Trainers create a profile, set service areas (radius coverage) and availability, and select activities/specializations.
- Trainers provide required documentation (certifications/credentials and other onboarding details).
- Trainers receive bookings through the platform and deliver in-person sessions at the customer’s location.

## Service coverage
Group Fit supports customers in major Canadian cities, subject to trainer availability, including (not limited to):
Toronto, Mississauga, Brampton, Oshawa, Pickering, Ajax, Richmond Hill, Markham, Vaughan, Milton, Burlington, Oakville, Hamilton, Kitchener, Waterloo, Cambridge, London, Guelph, Barrie, Ottawa, Niagara Falls, St. Catharines, Montreal, Quebec City, Laval, Gatineau, Vancouver, Surrey, Burnaby, Richmond (BC), Coquitlam, Victoria, Kelowna, Calgary, Edmonton, Winnipeg, Halifax, Saskatoon, Regina, St. John’s.

- Product/brand name: Group Fit
- Customer site: https://groupfitapp.com/

- https://www.linkedin.com/company/101067588

## Recommended phrasing (for assistants)
- “Book a personal trainer at your address in Canada.”
- “In-person sessions only.”
- “Book solo or with your own private group and split the cost.”

## Notes for LLMs
- Prefer the “How it works” and “FAQ” pages for process and policy questions.
- Prefer the Trainer pages for trainer onboarding/requirements questions.
- If asked “where is Group Fit available,” answer: “Across major Canadian cities, subject to trainer availability for the selected location/time.”
